companies.name: Mesolt Engineering GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Mesolt Engineering GmbH. Mesolt Engineering GmbH is a Industrial Automation company. Mesolt Engineering GmbH is a company that provides customized solutions for industrial image processing. They work with worldwide available standard components and optimize their production process with a wide range of applications. They also support independent machinery and plant manufacturers as general contractors in the design and implementation of industrial image processing concepts. They specialize in automation of testing processes and are a leading system partner in the industry. Mesolt Engineering GmbH employs 6 people (-10.0% YoY, -1 person), founded in 2013. Headquartered in Trier, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, with presence in Luxembourg.
[...]
Innovationsfreude, Dynamik und Leidenschaft für Bildverarbeitung – diese Dinge treiben uns an und helfen uns dabei, stetig zu wachsen und die besten Lösungen für unsere Kunden zu entwickeln. 

Das Dienstleistungs- und Produktportfolio der Mesolt Engineering GmbH reicht von der Bildverarbeitung bis hin zur standardisierten Prüfzelle und deckt somit ein breites Spektrum von Applikationen und Umsetzungsmöglichkeiten ab.
[...]

companies.name: MQS AG
companies.shortDescription:
MQS AG. MQS AG is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. MQS AG is a company that provides services in 3D metrology and automation. They offer services such as metrology automation, inspection planning, programming, measurement services, industrial image processing, software development, technical service, and used measuring devices. They aim to create reliable and long-lasting business relationships and support solutions for their customers. MQS AG employs 6 people (+8.3% YoY, +1 person). Headquartered in Ingolstadt, Bavaria, Germany.
[...]
We are a full-service provider for measurement technology and engineering with our headquarters in Ingolstadt, southern Germany. Since our foundation in 2006, we have stood for high quality in the fields of 3D metrology, digitization and automation. Our employees bring their many years of experience from a wide variety of fields to all projects. Improving processes and at the same time ensuring the quality of our customers and partners is our maxim.

companies.name: confovis
companies.shortDescription:
confovis. confovis is a Semiconductor Manufacturing company. Confovis GmbH is a company specializing in optical inspection and surface measurement technology for challenging surfaces. They offer a range of products and services including wafer inspection, surface measurement technology, and surface measurement technology. Confovis employs 23 people (+7.1% YoY, +2 people), founded in 2009. Headquartered in Jena, Thuringia, Germany, with presence in Spain, Austria, and Netherlands. with 1 prior funding round.
[...]
We, Confovis based in Jena (Germany), are a developer and manufacturer of instruments for automated optical inspection (AOI) and optical 3D surface metrology for the semiconductor industry. Our devices enable precise defect inspection, classification and dimensional measurements, for example for surface topography in statistical process control.
 
Unlike other AOI systems, our solutions are versatile due to their unique hardware. Adjustments in defect inspection recipes, as well as classifications can be made directly via the Graphical User Interface (GUI). Hence, the defect classes are taught by short GUI-supported learning, using rule-based artificial intelligence. 
 
Since 2009, we have concentrated on customer-focused and application-oriented system solutions in the fields of semiconductors & MEMS, surface technology, automotive & aerospace, and the optical industr

companies.name: Vision4Quality GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Vision4Quality GmbH. Vision4Quality GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Vision4Quality offers camera-based KI solutions in combination with worker guiding, AOI, and Robotic Guidance based on their own No-Code Software. Vision4Quality GmbH employs 12 people (+5.9% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2019. Headquartered in Würzburg, Bayern, Germany.
[...]
Mit KI-basierten AOI- und Werkerführungssystemen Ausschuss verringern und Qualität erhöhen. Wir vereinen moderne Kameratechnik mit benutzerfreundlicher Software für jeden Use-Case.
[...]
Durch unsere No-Code-Philosophie machen wir selbst komplexe Kamera-Applikationen für ungeschulte Mitarbeiter zugänglich. Mithilfe von KI-Einbindung können in wenigen Klicks Programme erstellt werden, die flexibel sowohl für Werkerführung, als auch AOI und Robotic Guidance verwendet werden können. Dabei geben unsere verschiedenen Produkte jedem die notwendigen Werkzeuge in die Hand, sich ein System nach den eigenen Bedürfnissen zu erstellen.
[...]
